name: pheno-cdylib-bridge
absorption_note: Rust C-ABI shared library exposing pheno-* Rust crates to Go (forgecode) and other languages; 3 branches, 49KB. Belongs in pheno monorepo as crates/cdylib-bridge.
note: Audited 2026-07-17; bridges Rust workspace to non-Rust callers. Should be part of pheno monorepo so the cdylib can keep its workspace deps consistent.
